ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the rule (e.g., error, warning) */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the rule (e.g., CDM conformance, DQ) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rule */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the rule, if applicable */,
  "rule_classification" TEXT /* Classification of the rule (e.g., plausibility) */,
  "rule_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the rule (e.g., specific data fields, entire dataset) */,
  "analysis_cnt" INTEGER /* Count of times the rule has been applied */,
  "analysis_list" INTEGER /* Number of specific instances where the rule has been triggered */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the rule */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the rule */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the rule (e.g., active, deactivated) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the rule */,
  "rule_script" TEXT /* Script or query used to implement the rule */,
  "impact_analysis" TEXT /* Brief analysis of the potential impact of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule application */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rule applied */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which the rule was applied */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific record where the rule was applied */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was applied */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the rule application (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the rule application */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule application was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the rule application */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule application was last updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the rule application */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_applications_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_applications_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_applications_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_applications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., clinical, financial) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the dataset */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the overall quality of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes or other units */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data steward, quality assurance analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
